rationale: The citation appears in the data section to identify that the core TiVo-IRI single-source data come from the same field study and to direct readers to the detailed study design in Bronnenberg, Dube, and Mela (2010). That role is important because the citing paper's empirical modeling and counterfactual targeting results depend on this data provenance. The citation is not a casual literature-list mention; it underpins where the main data-generating setting is documented.
relation_description: The citing paper relies on the field study documented in Bronnenberg et al. (2010) as the empirical foundation for its household-level viewing and purchase data. It then develops new modeling and targeting analyses on top of that established data context.
